zh.lifeSummary: Mary Fleming是Sir Malcolm Fleming of Fulwood and Cumbernauld的女兒，於1310年出生在英國蘇格蘭維托史爾維托。她於大約1330年與Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1364年10月11日在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Fleming是Sir Malcolm Fleming of Fulwood and Cumbernauld的女儿，于1310年出生在英国苏格兰維托史爾維托。她于大约1330年与Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1364年10月11日在英国苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fleming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Flemings
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Vleminckx: patronymic from Vleminck, an ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle Dutch vleminc.

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Flemming
meanings: German: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle High German vlaeminc. People from Flanders spread throughout Germany, as well as England, in the Middle Ages as clothmakers and dyers.

variants.name: Flamenco
meanings: Spanish: ethnic name from flamenco ‘Fleming, Flemish person’ (see Fleming ).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: Mary Fleming was born in 1310, in Wigtown, Wigtownshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir Malcolm Fleming of Fulwood and Cumbernauld. She married Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle about 1330, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 11 October 1364, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary Fleming est née en 1310, à Wigtown, Wigtownshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fille de Sir Malcolm Fleming of Fulwood and Cumbernauld. Elle a épousé Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle environ 1330, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 11 octobre 1364, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Mary Fleming wurde 1310 in Wigtown, Wigtownshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Sir Malcolm Fleming of Fulwood and Cumbernauld geboren. Sie hat um 1330 in Schottland, United Kingdom Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 11. Oktober 1364 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Mary Fleming è nata il nel 1310 nel Wigtown, Wigtownshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlia di Sir Malcolm Fleming of Fulwood and Cumbernauld. Lei sposato Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle circa 1330, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 11 ottobre 1364, nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Flemingは1310年にイギリススコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアウィグトウンでSir Malcolm Fleming of Fulwood and Cumbernauldの娘として生まれた。約1330年にイギリススコットランドでSir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1364年10月11日にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Fleming(은)는 1310년 영국 스코틀랜드 위그타운실르 위그타운에서 Sir Malcolm Fleming of Fulwood and Cumbernauld의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1330년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1364년 10월 11일 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary Fleming nasceu em 1310, em Wigtown, Wigtownshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filha de Sir Malcolm Fleming of Fulwood and Cumbernauld. Ela casou-se com Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle aproximadamente 1330, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1364, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Fleming родилась в 1310 г. в местности вигтоун, вигтоуншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Sir Malcolm Fleming of Fulwood and Cumbernauld. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle около 1330 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 11 октября 1364 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Mary Fleming nació en 1310, en Wigtown, Wigtownshire, Escocia, Reino Unido como hija de Sir Malcolm Fleming of Fulwood and Cumbernauld. Se casó con Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle aproximadamente 1330, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1364, en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
